title: Brazilian Chicken Casserole
description: A keto-friendly recipe that combines the flavors of Brazil with a classic casserole. This dish is perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and black pepper.
In a large skillet, cook the chicken over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through.
In a separate skillet, melt the coconut milk over medium heat.
Stir in the cheddar cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the chopped cilantro and garlic powder to the cheese mixture.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange the cooked chicken in a single layer.
Pour the cheese mixture over the chicken.
Sprinkle the crunchy casserole topping over the cheese mixture.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the casserole is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
